review_title: Simple and very easy to use resource scheduling\tracking app.
description: Resource Guru is a great resource scheduling application for a simple use cases. It does what it promises perfectly. The UI is very friendly and pleasant - make for a great user experience. I used it to track the tasks for my team for almost a year. I would have kept using it but the company mandated a different tracking system and I had to abandon it. I like that Resource Guru'a focus on their product and customer service. I also appreciated the slow introduction of new features. Overall, very pleasant and satisfactory experience with a great application.
author: Myroslav P.
pros: - Ease of use - Very pleasant UI - Flexibility
cons: - Lack of features. The application does the simple scheduling\tracking perfectly though. - Copy\paste of resource tasks was not available at the time

review_title: Excellent Product for Multiple Staff and Multiple Projects
description: The tool and support has been a great experience. I have recommended this tool to all my colleagues inside my organization and outside. I have been using it for 11 months now and it has been working extremely well.
author: Adam S.
pros: The app is very user friendly and a majority of my staff are able to login and run Resource Guru without any issues. It is a streamline software for project management across multiple projects and departments.
cons: They actually just added what my con would be. The Milestone tool helps better manage project milestones. This is a tool that didn't exist before but was desperately needed. Thank you!

review_title: An adequate calendaring tool for resource management
description: We use Resource Guru to manage the utilization/booking of our research facilities. This works well for us as we have a small number of facilities we manage. I cannot offer a recommendation for/against this project for large numbers of resources (>10) as it might be cumbersome at that point. For our limited resource pool, it works well.
author: Steve B.
pros: The interface is simple to use and understand with respect to resource availability and conflict. It serves its purpose well.
cons: New feature rollout is buggy. When I switched between the "beta" ("new") experience back to the classic, I received a nagging email from the company telling me I had recently logged in using the "classic" experience and it would eventually be discontinued, and that I should try out the "new" experience. This product is basically a shared calendar, and while it offers reporting that is a hybrid somewhere between Microsoft Outlook and Project, it's a bit too pushy with respect to new features.

author: Tracy S.
pros: I love how convenient and useful resource guru is. It’s very affordable and good for business and personal needs.
cons: I have absolutely no dislikes on the use of resource guru. I highly recommend this software to businesses owners and friends.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It is so much user friendly.
description: Awsome it is just cherry on the top which makes life easier.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease of access. It is so reliable and easy to work with at any moment.
cons: Nothing. The prompt updates and regular updates are amazing.

description: Easy to use with a splendid overview. The team managers are adapting to it well, so having two layers of management and the ability to track all layers is perfect.
author: Søren Find M.
pros: I like that it doesn't try to be anything else than resource allocation, and that it does this very well. In a department with 25 people plus some 'machines', we manage to keep track on our activities very well, and distribute the load in time and across the resources as needed.
cons: I find it very intuitive, both for the user who can view the bookings, and for the manager who tries to keep track on everything. As stated above, many tools try to embrace project management, time registration, etc. - but we are really interested in the resource allocation only. If I should mention anything, it would be the request for slightly more flexible reporting options. However, the people behind Resource Guru are very responsive, so they will probably fix it before I am done with the review.
author_profession: Head of Electrical and Mechanical, RnD

description: Overall, I would recommend this as a simple and useful scheduling tool. It gives an overview of different elements of what requires scheduling depending on needs. It is modern.
author: Daniel J.
pros: Simple to use Visually appealing Can have multiple views to filter for simplicity Can capture all required information
cons: When uploading an image, it can get cut off which required playing around with cropping the image for the perfect fit.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: In my experience, it is a flexible, versatile time management tool providing a quick visual reference of everyones' location and task, drill deeper for contact info, client details, equipment etc. Hierarchical access enables permissions to be tuned for edits and updates.
author: Kei B.
pros: Layout, Visual clarity of projects & the ability to see what everyone is up to is a massive help
cons: TBH, not much, even the 'mail notifications (for the day) are more refined now !

description: I like very much the interface and easy access
author: Maria I.
pros: Easy to use and easy to connect with others scheduling programs
cons: The posdibility to Download all the schedule: it

description: User friendly. No issues overall. Love that I can color code jobs based on client and employee.
author: Candace O.
pros: Ease of use. Color Coding. Ability to customize customers.
cons: Unable to add check marks or drop downs for why a customer is in or what has been completed. Have to type in the body of the info.

description: Am happy with it user friendly just some small changes then it will be supper good for us
author: Nyaradzo M.
pros: Resource allocation, we were able to allocate resources and not clashing, also its necessary to see who is where and what is he doing.
cons: Not able to add sub tasksnot able to close a task when done or track if its been done

review_title: Brilliant, intuitive platform with top class customer support
description: It has turned something we used to do slowly and manually into something done in seconds.
author: Tom S.
pros: It looks great, the daily update emails are really helpful, it's very easy to use and the reporting is incredibly useful
cons: I wish there were more features, especially around putting in (and being able to export) a project timeline with milestones. This would mean you could see the duration of a project and its different phases, then see all the resources booked underneath. I would also love a mobile app!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Stephanie M.
pros: The ability to schedule out months at a time. Small projects do not get lost in the shuffle of construction projects that go on months at a time where we are constantly pulling on and off of. It is so easy to use and customize. Field staff caught on intuitively and almost immediately.
cons: I cant think of anything I don't love about RG. I do not use many of the advanced features because we have project management software that gives us reporting.

description: As a small, but growing organization, we were having trouble measuring how our creative resources were being allocated. Resource Guru quickly solved that problem.
author: Marc H.
pros: The software was very easy to implement and even easier to use. The reports page provides a great, visual presentation of our creative department's utilization for the week. Until we started using the software, we were unable to track enough data to inform a successful creative resource meeting. Now we have visibility into the upcoming weeks which has significantly decreased our dependence on freelance talent.
cons: The waiting list and overtime feature can be a little confusing. The hours don't get added to resource bookings and increase the utilization percentage. It would be great if the overtime hours pushed the utilization percentage over 100% to clearly highlight over-allocated resources.
author_profession: VP, Director of Operations and Project Management

description: Honestly, despite being a work tool, sometimes it felt like a game and it is incredibly satisfying to use it. Very feel softwares feel that intimate or that nice to use.
author: Rafael G.
pros: Fore forecasting tools offered by Resource Guru are fantastic. It is easy to use and it is very interactive.
cons: It just gets to a point where if the business grows too much, it feels like Resource Guru isn't able to handle it as well as some of the competitors. The Scalability they offer could be better.

description: Very positive experience, the software is updated regularly and I feel Resource Guru staff listen to feedback.
author: Jonathan M.
pros: It's quick to learn and has powerful tools, is simple to use and integrated quickly into our existing work practices. All our staff are adept at using it and it helps us keep on top of resources, projects and workflow. It is good value for money.
cons: No complaints, we have been using Resource Guru for about two years and are very happy with it.

description: I like it a lot in general, it is very easy to use and the UX is super smooth.
author: Isabella M.
pros: It is very easy to plan time for creatives and strategists, and the UX is extremely smooth. I also like how I can add a lot of project and clients so the plannings are super organized.
cons: It is still missing a proper Project Management Tool

author: Jocelyn B.
pros: it is easy to use and with fast visual management
cons: difficulty to link guru with an other tool

review_title: Resource Guru makes the scheduling easy!
author: Nimesh E.
pros: It's easy to use and manage all information required. Nice UI and improved UX is one of the key things I get attracted to when using the system.
cons: I can't think of cons as of now since I'm loving the app.

review_title: Resource Guru is a great online tool that does a perfect job in scheduling resources on projects!
description: Overall, we are very happy with the tool. Over the course of years, we had to find work arounds and come up with creative solutions (within what's possible in Resource Guru) but having found those solutions, we are getting what we need from Resource Guru.
author: Amirreza F.
pros: Generally speaking the UX/UI of this platform is very user friendly and easy to learn/use. I love the color coding feature (that can be used for marking projects, resources, etc) and the recently added filtering by the "Resource Booker" is very useful too. Last but not least, I like that Resource Guru keep this product alive as every once in a while they publish new features and enhancements.
cons: Resource Guru for our organization does a great job of helping us schedule resources of projects over time. So I can't really think of major issues. But one minor pain point is once we create a "non-billable" project and schedule resources on that project. Often and after a while (usually when a project is signed and official) we have to change that project to "billable", but although we do that, we still need to manually update each and every resource booking under the "Schedule" section and mark each booking to be "billable". Ideally and if we change the billability on a project level, all those resource bookings should inherit the change that was applied to the project.

description: It has been an excellent experience. I brought resource guru to my current company after experiencing it as a project manager at another consulting firm.
author: Patrick B.
pros: The ability to filter, sort, and visualize resource assignments across 50+ individuals with a variety of technical abilities has helped remove a lot of the pain in managing geographical diverse field crews
cons: I would like the ability to see 4-6 months on the screen at once. Instead of individual blocks for each day, I would like to see each block represent one week (a zoom out option). Some projects are 1-5 days, while a lot of assignments are 3+ months.

review_title: Easy UI and a big time saver
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like that I can see other colleagues schedules too as it means I can plan my time off and see who is on projects with me without having to go through others
cons: Nothing! I love the filtering option in the schedule and the scheduling and calendar are the only features I tend to use and they're perfect.

review_title: A very user-friendly tool to plan your team activities!
author: Filippo M.
pros: I personally find very useful being able to schedule tasks for me and my colleagues in a way that is easy to compile and understand (no more multiple Google calendars for each project!). Very nice that you can also choose between having a time-based booking or specific time. In general most of the features are very user friendly and changes to tasks/events can be applied very quickly.
cons: Unfortunately the mobile view is not very clear and it takes a few steps to go on the task-page. This means that most of the time I prefer going back to my laptop (when I can!) to insert tasks or check my schedule. An app that takes me with on tap to my task page would be highly beneficial in my day-to-day business.

review_title: The best stand alone solution for resource management
description: We're using ResourceGuru for weekly planing, when we plan the up-coming week for every creative and strategy members. And every day, through a short stand-up meeting, we review the daily plan of everyone to make sure everything is clear. Thanks to the simplicity of the UI we can easily replan on the fly in case of project changes.
author: Jeremie B.
pros: UX is awesome Simplicity of the solution.
cons: The one-side only integration with Google Calendar. If we plan meeting in people's calendar, ideally it populates ResourceGuru (and would place it in queue in case of conflict/overtime). The integration with other software, like Harvest, is inexistent, isn't it?

review_title: Amazing software that's incredibly useful for our Studio team
description: We as a team absloutely love using RG, we use it on a daily basis and it really has transformed the way in which we work as a team, making us more collaborative and organised.
author: Emma M.
pros: Can't believe how cheap this software is and all the built in capabilities! It's great, we are a team of 7 and this has helped us with our project management bookings. You can clearly see what work is booked in over the weeks/months and allows you easily to move stuff round.
cons: I would like there to be an option to have specific colours per clients. It would also be good if it retained hours per project. For example we have big animation projects in that are broken down into sketches, moodboard, animation etc and would be good to have some sort of log if the time gets moved.
